name: io.github.hubertgajewski/playwright-report-mcp
description: Run Playwright tests and surface structured results for AI agents doing test failure analysis.

environmentVariables.name: PW_ALLOWED_DIRS
environmentVariables.description: path.delimiter-separated list of directories the per-call workingDirectory parameter may point at. Entries may be absolute or relative (resolved once against the server's launch cwd at startup). Defaults to '.' (authorizes only the launch directory).

environmentVariables.name: PW_RESULTS_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path override for the JSON reporter output file. Defaults to <workingDirectory>/test-results/results.json, computed per call.
